title: Laboratory Equipment
description: Analytical instrumentation and heavy hardware including meters, scales, sterilization units, and safety enclosures.

subcategories.name: pH & Conductivity Meters
subcategories.description: Benchtop and portable meters for water quality analysis, environmental monitoring, and process control in industrial and research labs.

subcategories.name: Analytical Balances & Scales
subcategories.description: Precision weighing instruments from 0.0001 g readability for analytical chemistry to 30 kg capacity for bulk material weighing.

subcategories.name: Autoclaves & Sterilizers
subcategories.description: Steam sterilization equipment for laboratory, clinical, and pharmaceutical use. Vertical and horizontal models available.

subcategories.name: Water Distillers & Purifiers
subcategories.description: Deionized and distilled water production systems delivering Type I, II, and III water quality for sensitive analytical applications.

subcategories.name: Fume Cupboards & Laminar Flows
subcategories.description: Ducted and ductless fume hoods for chemical handling, plus vertical and horizontal laminar flow cabinets for sterile work environments.
